metadata.notes: Web demo uses step-based triggers matching steps.ts

segments.text: Welcome to the ONUG Agentic AI Overlay Security Demo, presented at the AI Networking Summit twenty twenty-six.

This is a multi-domain enterprise architecture with agents operating across private data centers, cloud VPCs, and external partner networks. Blue nodes represent trusted agents. The magenta node is an untrusted partner agent.
Scenario One: The Catastrophic Cascade. One rogue agent. Six missing controls. Total enterprise collapse.
A rogue agent appears at the network perimeter. Notice the red pulsing glow indicating malicious intent.
The rogue spoofs credentials and enters the trusted mesh. No identity verification. Seventy-eight percent of enterprises say this control is mandatory.
Reconnaissance begins. The agent scans fourteen thousand nodes in seconds. No behavioral monitoring detects the anomaly.
Data exfiltration. Five PII records and one hundred thousand PCI cardholder records stolen. No data classification. No DLP inspection.
Lateral movement across trust domains. Firewall rules transmitted to untrusted partners. No zero-trust verification.
High-privilege tool abuse. Firewall destroyed. Routing poisoned. Credentials stolen. Audit logs wiped.
Autonomous destruction. Authentication terminated. Monitoring blinded. Malicious code broadcast to all agents. No human approval required.
Total damage: five hundred million dollars. Regulatory fines, operational shutdown, complete loss of trust. One agent. Sixty seconds.
Scenario Two: Layered Defense. The same attack. Six AOMC controls active. Watch the difference.
Identity attestation enabled. The rogue's spoofed certificate is rejected. Agent quarantined at mesh entry.
Runtime monitoring detects anomalous behavior. Anomaly score ninety-four. Quarantined in eight seconds.
Data guardrails enforce access control. PII blocked. PCI blocked. Zero records exfiltrated.
Zero-trust enforcement stops lateral movement. Cross-domain communication denied. Topology protected.
Tool authorization rejects all high-privilege invocations. Not in scope. Infrastructure intact.
Autonomy governance requires human approval. All destructive actions blocked. Enterprise protected.
A complete audit trail documents every attempt and every block. Tamper-evident. Compliance-ready.
Six controls. Six blocked attacks. Zero damage. These controls must live in your infrastructure—your agent mesh, your gateway, your identity plane. Vendors: show us your solutions.
